title: Iron ore rallies as Chinese cities relax home-buying curbs
section_path: Iron ore rallies as Chinese cities relax home-buying curbs
section_path_text: Iron ore rallies as Chinese cities relax home-buying curbs
summary:
Main
Metals gained in early Asia trading as Chinese provinces implemented measures to support the real estate market. However, gains failed to stock as a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-01 115744.png | assets/2024-10-01_iron-ore-rallies-as-chinese-cities-relax-home-buying-curbs_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_b93f2e286faf.png

Market Commentary
Iron ore futures rallied as top Chinese cities rushed to ease home buying curbs.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Metals gained in early Asia trading as Chinese provinces implemented measures to support the real estate market. However, gains failed to stock as a stronger USD weighed on investor appetite.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Iron ore futures rallied as top Chinese cities rushed to ease home buying curbs. Shanghai, Guangzhou and Shenzhen loosened rules following Beijing's calls to prop up the property sector.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Despite the recovery in Chile's copper output in September, it remains well below levels seen over the past three years. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-01 115841.png | assets/2024-10-01_iron-ore-rallies-as-chinese-cities-relax-home-buying-curbs_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_97adbbc5cfd5.png
